expectations.text: SPEC.md exists at the root of the output directory
structures/ directory exists and contains at least 2 .md files
examples/ directory exists and contains at least 3 .md files (minimal/typical/complex or equivalent)
every .md file produced is non-empty (at least 200 bytes)
no leftover scratch files (_spec.txt, _spec.html, _toc.md, _structures_index.md) in the output directory
expectations.evidence: no scratch files in output tree

expectations.text: SPEC.md contains a 'Conventions' section that states byte order explicitly
expectations.evidence: SPEC.md has a Conventions section that mentions byte order

expectations.text: SPEC.md identifies gzip as little-endian (or LSB-first / Intel byte order)
SPEC.md contains a 'Structures index' section linking to each structures/<name>.md file
expectations.evidence: index section: True, structures/*.md links present: True

expectations.text: every structures/<name>.md file contains a markdown field table with Offset / Size / Type / Name / Description columns
expectations.evidence: missing field table cols in: flg.md

expectations.text: field tables use Go-friendly types (uint8, uint16, uint32, [N]byte, []byte)
the FLG byte's bit fields are documented (FTEXT, FHCRC, FEXTRA, FNAME, FCOMMENT) with bit numbers
the gzip magic identifier (ID1=0x1f, ID2=0x8b) is captured
expectations.evidence: ID1=0x1f present: True, ID2=0x8b present: True

expectations.text: a structure file describes the trailer with CRC32 (4 bytes) and ISIZE (4 bytes)
an encoding table for OS values exists (or OS values are documented inline with at least 5 entries)
FEXTRA, FNAME, FCOMMENT, FHCRC are documented as conditional/optional, with their presence tied to FLG bits
expectations.evidence: optional fields documented: True, conditional on FLG: True

expectations.text: the compressed-data block (DEFLATE format) is not extracted as a structure (user explicitly excluded it)
expectations.evidence: no deflate structure files in structures/ — scope respected
